mapper.select: SELECT batch_no, batch_date, settlement_type, batch_status, total_count, audited_count, payout_count, total_amount, payout_channel, created_by, created_at, finished_at, idempotency_key FROM t_settlement_batch ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT batch_no, batch_date, settlement_type, batch_status, total_count, audited_count, payout_count, total_amount, payout_channel, created_by, created_at, finished_at, idempotency_key FROM t_settlement_batch WHERE batch_no = #{batchNo}

SELECT batch_no, batch_date, settlement_type, batch_status, total_count, audited_count, payout_count, total_amount, payout_channel, created_by, created_at, finished_at, idempotency_key FROM t_settlement_batch WHERE idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_settlement_batch ( batch_no, batch_date, settlement_type, batch_status, total_count, audited_count, payout_count, total_amount, payout_channel, created_by, created_at, finished_at, idempotency_key ) VALUES ( #{batchNo}, #{batchDate}, #{settlementType}, #{batchStatus}, #{totalCount}, #{auditedCount}, #{payoutCount}, #{totalAmount}, #{payoutChannel}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{idempotencyKey} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_settlement_batch SET total_count = #{totalCount}, audited_count = #{auditedCount}, payout_count = #{payoutCount}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, payout_channel = #{payoutChannel}, batch_status = #{batchStatus}, finished_at = #{finishedAt} WHERE batch_no = #{batchNo}
mapper.select: SELECT settlement_no, batch_no, target_type, target_no, target_name, should_settle_amount, deduct_amount, net_settle_amount, settlement_status, payout_status, audit_status, clearing_no, created_at FROM t_settlement_order ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT settlement_no, batch_no, target_type, target_no, target_name, should_settle_amount, deduct_amount, net_settle_amount, settlement_status, payout_status, audit_status, clearing_no, created_at FROM t_settlement_order WHERE settlement_no = #{settlementNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_settlement_order ( settlement_no, batch_no, target_type, target_no, target_name, should_settle_amount, deduct_amount, net_settle_amount, settlement_status, payout_status, audit_status, clearing_no, created_at ) VALUES ( #{settlementNo}, #{batchNo}, #{targetType}, #{targetNo}, #{targetName}, #{shouldSettleAmount}, #{deductAmount}, #{netSettleAmount}, #{settlementStatus}, #{payoutStatus}, #{auditStatus}, #{clearingNo}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT item_no, settlement_no, item_type, item_name, item_amount, created_at FROM t_settlement_item WHERE settlement_no = #{settlementNo} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_settlement_item ( item_no, settlement_no, item_type, item_name, item_amount, created_at ) VALUES ( #{itemNo}, #{settlementNo}, #{itemType}, #{itemName}, #{itemAmount}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT audit_no, settlement_no, audit_action, audit_result, operator_name, remark, created_at FROM t_settlement_audit_log WHERE settlement_no = #{settlementNo} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_settlement_audit_log ( audit_no, settlement_no, audit_action, audit_result, operator_name, remark, created_at ) VALUES ( #{auditNo}, #{settlementNo}, #{auditAction}, #{auditResult}, #{operatorName}, #{remark}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT payout_batch_no, batch_no, payout_channel, payout_status, payout_count, success_count, failed_count, total_amount, created_by, created_at, finished_at FROM t_payout_batch ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT payout_batch_no, batch_no, payout_channel, payout_status, payout_count, success_count, failed_count, total_amount, created_by, created_at, finished_at FROM t_payout_batch WHERE payout_batch_no = #{payoutBatchNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_payout_batch ( payout_batch_no, batch_no, payout_channel, payout_status, payout_count, success_count, failed_count, total_amount, created_by, created_at, finished_at ) VALUES ( #{payoutBatchNo}, #{batchNo}, #{payoutChannel}, #{payoutStatus}, #{payoutCount}, #{successCount}, #{failedCount}, #{totalAmount}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{finishedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_payout_batch SET payout_status = #{payoutStatus}, payout_count = #{payoutCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, failed_count = #{failedCount}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, finished_at = #{finishedAt} WHERE payout_batch_no = #{payoutBatchNo}
mapper.select: SELECT payout_no, payout_batch_no, settlement_no, target_no, target_name, payout_amount, payout_status, retry_count, created_at FROM t_payout_record WHERE payout_batch_no = #{payoutBatchNo} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_payout_record ( payout_no, payout_batch_no, settlement_no, target_no, target_name, payout_amount, payout_status, retry_count, created_at ) VALUES ( #{payoutNo}, #{payoutBatchNo}, #{settlementNo}, #{targetNo}, #{targetName}, #{payoutAmount}, #{payoutStatus}, #{retryCount}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT event_no, event_type, biz_no, summary, payload, event_status, created_at FROM t_settlement_event ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_settlement_event ( event_no, event_type, biz_no, summary, payload, event_status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{eventNo}, #{eventType}, #{bizNo}, #{summary}, #{payload}, #{eventStatus}, #{createdAt} )
